post.description: Send a confirmation email with PKCE-protected link for account deletion. This initiates a secure two-step deletion process to prevent accidental account loss.

200.description: Account deletion confirmation email sent successfully

message.example: Account deletion confirmation email sent. Please check your inbox and follow the link to confirm deletion.
message.description: Success message indicating the confirmation email has been sent

expiresAt.description: Expiration time of the deletion confirmation link (ISO 8601 format)

400.description: Bad request - Invalid PKCE code challenge

error.description: Error message explaining the validation failure

404.description: Not found - User account not found

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to send confirmation email

post.description: Confirm account deletion using PKCE-protected token from email. This permanently deletes the user account and all associated data including family relationships, group memberships, and personal information. This action is irreversible.

400.description: Bad request - Invalid token or PKCE code verifier

error.example: Invalid deletion token or PKCE verification failed
error.description: Error message explaining the validation failure

403.description: Forbidden - Token expired or already used

error.example: Deletion token has expired or already been used
error.description: Error message indicating token is no longer valid

404.description: Not found - Invalid deletion token or user not found

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to complete account deletion
